product_highlights: ROVISOME® - Phospholipid-based liposomes for superior active delivery
RHEASOME® - Nanostructured lipid carriers for enhanced skin penetration
InuMax® - Inulin-based encapsulation for natural/organic formulations

Proven clinical evidence for enhanced bioavailability
notes: Global specialty chemicals leader with one of the most comprehensive advanced delivery system portfolios in cosmetic science. ROVISOME® liposomes and RHEASOME® NLCs are industry benchmarks for active ingredient delivery. Strong technical support and formulation expertise. Key partner for SKIN-TWIN integration requiring delivery system intelligence.
